examples: A lot of publishers are using such codes, but they can't be added frivolously for the cool factor.
The holiness of God requires us to take our worship seriously and not to participate frivolously.
I had a retirement plan, but on the 3 occasions when I changed jobs, I withdrew that and spent it frivolously.
Try not to eat out at restaurants too much, take taxis or spend frivolously on clothes.
Kevin has some lofty goals though, so he does not spend his money frivolously.
